mapper.select: SELECT t.team_id, t.team_name, t.emblem, s.name FROM kleague_team t NATURAL JOIN kleague_stadium s ORDER BY ${col} ASC
SELECT team_name,emblem FROM kleague_team WHERE team_id=#{id}
SELECT s.name,s.ticket_policy_image FROM kleague_team t NATURAL JOIN kleague_stadium s WHERE team_id=#{id}

select s.schedule_id,TO_CHAR(s.game_date,'MM-DD') as dbday,s.game_time,t.team_name,t.emblem FROM kleague_schedule s INNER JOIN kleague_team t ON s.away_team_id=t.team_id WHERE (s.game_date BETWEEN SYSDATE AND SYSDATE+31) AND home_team_id=#{id} ORDER BY s.game_date ASC
